creator: manu@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 184884
u-boot-pine64

Update the u-boot-pine64 port to use u-boot-master
Update the u-boot-master port to handle Allwinner 64 bits SoC.

This should not be commited before https://github.com/freebsd/u-boot/pull/2 is merged and that the ports-v2017.07.01 branch is created from that.
